title: angraecum umbrosum
intro: Angraecum umbrosum, also known as the "cat's whisker orchid," is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. It is native to tropical Africa and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The extracts of Angraecum umbrosum have been found to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, Angraecum umbrosum is often used to make infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, which are used to treat various health conditions, including fever, respiratory issues, and skin problems.
